name: Amorous Infrastrastructure
desc: Build 6 different Q-Pedd planet structures (via artifacts) on various planets
strategy: Hyperluminal, Probe, CogNode, Emotion, Autoform, Disseminator

name: Bonding Ritual
desc: Use a 'Streveldan Bond-Key' on friends or legion members, on those of 10 different races

name: Synthetic Overrides
desc:
Hack research from members of the following Cybernetic-Proficient species, that each have a 'Streveldan Schematics' active on their ship
Vygoid, Zolazin, Drannik

name: Sensoral Linking
desc: Use a Supel Sensor Readings on players of 5 different races, while you also have a Supel Sensor Readings active on your ship as well

name: Biomech Infrastructure
desc: Build 6 different Lepus planet structures (via artifacts) on various planets

name: Signature Forgery
desc: Hack research from members of 6 different races, that each have a 'Political Endorsement' active on their ship

name: Diplomatic Infrastructure
desc: Build planet structures that provide both Influence & Research, on 6 different planet types
